reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the 2006 film in which Ron Perkins plays the manager of a hotel.
2. Using that film, determine who directed it.
original_final_question: Who directed a 2006 film where Ron Perkins character plays the manager of a hotel? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which 2006 film featured Ron Perkins as the manager of a hotel? Evidence: Ron Perkins: Ron Perkins is an American actor who has been active since the early 1960s. He also appeared in "The Prestige" (2006) as the manager of a hotel visited by Hugh Jackman's character in Colorado Springs, as well as nine episodes of Fox TV series "House" as Dr. Ron Simpson. -> The Prestige

Node 2: Who directed the 2006 film The Prestige? Evidence: The Prestige (film): The Prestige is a 2006 British-American mystery thriller film directed by Christopher Nolan, from a screenplay adapted by Nolan and his brother Jonathan from Christopher Priest's 1995 novel of the same name. -> Christopher Nolan
